summary: CLI public surface is centralized in packages/cli/src/commands/index.ts via allCommands consumed by packages/cli/src/index.ts defineCommand; remove approve/update/sync-meta/human-lint/ledger-append/pre-commit/bootstrap/config/hooks from this map to drop help and runtime dispatch. Do not blindly delete bootstrap/config/hooks helpers because init imports installBootstrap/installHooks/installMcpClients for one-shot setup. Docs still advertise removed commands in README.md, packages/cli/README.md, docs/initialization.md, docs/getting-started.md, docs/RULE_REGISTRY.md, docs/dashboard-tour.md, docs/contributing.md, docs/CONVENTIONS.md. Templates couple to removed public commands: packages/cli/templates/husky/pre-commit and templates/husky/pre-commit invoke fabric pre-commit and mention sync-meta; bootstrap templates mention fabric sync-meta. Tests to remove/rework include approve.test.ts, ledger-append.test.ts, sync-meta*.test.ts, pre-commit portions of pre-commit-update.test.ts, update portion of pre-commit-update.test.ts, config-install.test.ts; i18n locale keys/snapshots include removed command descriptions. Doctor CLI currently supports --audit/--fix only, not target --json/--strict semantics; README says doctor --audit and must change.

Target state conflicts with init/sync/doc surfaces: init still plans and writes .fabric/human-lock.json; init plan preview prints it; initial meta contains only bootstrap and no .fabric/rules scan; follow-up Claude/Codex skills still direct generated rule nodes to .fabric/agents. sync-meta is the current meta/rule-test builder but scans .fabric/agents/**/*.md, accepts legacy AGENTS.md bootstrap, and records source sync_meta events. doctor mixes target rules checks with legacy human-lock and intent-ledger migration, so doctor --fix must replace migrateLegacyLedger/syncExistingMetaBaseline with deterministic .fabric/rules -> agents.meta/rule-test.index/events builder. Event ledger service already uses .fabric/events.jsonl and tests assert no writes to .intent-ledger/audit, but read-ledger/audit-log still read legacy projections. Docs/templates/dashboard expose human-lock, approve, sync-meta, .fabric/agents, old ledgers.

MCP registration still imports/registers fab_append_intent and fab_update_registry in packages/server/src/index.ts; index.test asserts deprecated descriptions, so removal must change expected tool list to only fab_plan_context/fab_get_rule_sections. Replacement APIs already exist: planContext writes rule_context_planned, getRuleSections writes rule_selection plus rule_sections_fetched to .fabric/events.jsonl, and HTTP JsonlEventStore writes mcp_event there. Deleting tool files should also remove tests/services append-intent/update-registry unless kept private. Legacy coupling remains in audit-log/read-ledger/http/events/doctor: .fabric/audit.jsonl fallback, .fabric/.intent-ledger.jsonl/root legacy reads, migrateLegacyLedger, ledger watchers, and doctor Intent ledger checks. Doctor target should validate .fabric/events.jsonl exists/writable/parseable and MCP readiness, not migrate old ledgers. Docs/templates/i18n still mention deprecated tools, sync-meta, legacy paths, and dashboard labels Intent ledger.
